source_caption: usydcarclub 4 w 🏁 2026 USYD GRAND PRIX: Presented by @usydcarclub & @formsocusyd 🏁 Lights out and away we go! 🏎️💨 Yes that’s right! We are back for Round 2 — and just like last time, we are taking over Hyperkarting 😈 Whether you’re chasing your first podium or just here for the vibes, this is your chance to experience the thrill of wheel to wheel racing with fellow USYD petrolheads and F1 fans alike! Join us for an unforgettable night of indoor karting action at the 2026 USYD GRAN PRIX! 📍Location: Hyperkarting (Moore Park) 📆 Date: Thursday 19th March (Week 4) ⏱️ Time: 7:30PM (Please arrive early!) 🎟️ Price: $35 per person 🔗 Sign up: Link in our Linktree (Bio) ⚠️ LIMITED SPOTS AVAILABLE - first come, first served! Get your tickets ASAP! Let’s make round 2 even bigger than round 1! 🏎️💨 #usyd #usydoweek #usu #usydcarclub #f1

event.description: Join the USYD Car Club and Formuso SYD for Round 2 of the USYD Grand Prix, an exciting indoor karting event at Hyperkarting (Moore Park). Experience the thrill of wheel-to-wheel racing with fellow USYD enthusiasts in a limited spots, first come, first served ticket sale at $35 per person.
